creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text: Since this is the issues tracking system of the FreeBSD project, the upstream of the PFSense, we might not be very helpful if this is due to any customization in the PFSense.  We're still willing to help, but it would be much helpful if you can test net-mgmt/softflowd with the supported FreeBSD versions and report if it work or not. If possilbe, testing with 13.0-RELEASE, 13.0-STABLE and 14.0-CURRENT is more preferred. Thanks.
